name: Federal Title V Operating Permit (CA air districts)
what_it_does: Consolidated operating permit for major stationary sources, issued by CA air districts.
jurisdiction: US EPA delegated to the local air district

hypotheses.question: Is the facility a major source requiring a Title V operating permit?
hypotheses.claim_to_test: Potential to emit >=100 tpy of a regulated pollutant (lower in nonattainment; 10/25 tpy HAP) makes a source a Title V major source.
